description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a rectangular footprint, featuring a light-colored exterior and a dark, gabled roof. The front facade includes a covered porch with columns, two symmetrical garden beds, and a driveway leading to an attached garage. The rear of the bungalow opens onto a spacious patio with outdoor seating and a swimming pool, surrounded by landscaped trees and shrubs. Large windows are distributed across the front and back, providing ample natural light to the interior. The property is bordered by a mix of deciduous and evergreen trees, enhancing its suburban appeal. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with a focus on outdoor living and curb appeal.
description: A modern, light-colored bungalow with a gabled roof, front porch, attached garage, and a backyard patio with a pool, surrounded by landscaped trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, symmetrical garden beds, driveway, and attached garage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and a glimpse of the backyard pool and patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the spacious patio, outdoor seating, swimming pool, and surrounding trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the backyard pool, patio, and the side of the house with additional landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with large rear windows
